name: NoteDiscovery
compose:
name: slashnode-notediscovery
services:
  web:
    image: ghcr.io/gamosoft/notediscovery:0.27.2
    container_name: notediscovery
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    volumes:
      - web_data:/app/data
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8736:8000
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data:
    name: slashnode-notediscovery_web_data
